vocab.example: I’ve always been drawn to impressionist paintings because of the way they capture light and movement.

vocab.meaning: tìm hiểu sâu/nghiên cứu kỹ về
vocab.example: Lately, I’ve started to delve into the world of digital art to understand how technology influences creativity.

vocab.meaning: phấn khích/say mê quá mức về một chi tiết nào đó
vocab.example: I can totally geek out over the choice of color palettes in Wes Anderson's films; they are masterpieces.

vocab.meaning: đắm chìm/quên hết mọi thứ xung quanh khi làm gì
vocab.example: There’s nothing I enjoy more than losing myself in a vast art gallery on a quiet Sunday afternoon.
Contemplative art pieces often force me to reflect on my own life experiences and emotions.

vocab.meaning: nhận ra/cảm nhận được (những chi tiết tinh tế)
vocab.example: An art enthusiast can easily pick up on the subtle symbolism hidden within a surrealist sculpture.
I always look out for emerging local artists when visiting weekend craft fairs or pop-up galleries.

vocab.meaning: cảm thấy hợp/thích thú với (phong cách, bầu không khí)
vocab.example: I don't really vibe with minimalist decor; I much prefer the chaotic energy of maximalist art.

vocab.meaning: khơi mào/kích thích (ý tưởng hoặc cảm hứng)
vocab.example: Visiting a contemporary art museum often sparks off new ideas for my own graphic design projects.
It took me a good hour just to take in the sheer scale and complexity of the mural on the city hall.
